hypothesis: An active-learning evaluation pipeline that selects for DFT validation only the generated structures with highest disagreement between latent-space similarity (Fréchet distance) and property-based EMD scores will reproduce the full DFT-based SUN ranking of generative models (e.g., CDVAE, GemsDiff, DiffCSP) with at least 95% Spearman rank correlation while requiring DFT calculations for no more than 10% of generated candidates.
